description: LiveNX device observability — flow, SNMP, traps, syslog, configs

targets.rawSql:
SELECT countDistinct(DeviceSerial) AS value
FROM livenx_modeldb.device_dist
WHERE IsDeleted = false AND DeviceSerial != ''

SELECT countDistinct(serial) AS value
FROM (
    SELECT device_serial AS serial FROM network_observability.avc_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    UNION DISTINCT
    SELECT device_serial AS serial FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    UNION DISTINCT
    SELECT device_serial AS serial FROM network_observability.medianet_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
)

SELECT countDistinct(device_serial) AS value
FROM network_observability.avc_flows_5m
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR

SELECT countDistinct(toString(DeviceId)) AS value
FROM livenx_snmpdb.device_metric_dist
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR

SELECT count() AS value
FROM default.otel_logs
WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
  AND ServiceName = 'snmptrapreceiver'

SELECT count() AS value
FROM default.otel_logs
WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
  AND Body LIKE '%SYS-%'

SELECT signal AS label, device_count AS value
FROM (
    SELECT 'AVC Flow' AS signal,
           countDistinct(device_serial) AS device_count
    FROM network_observability.avc_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Basic Flow',
           countDistinct(device_serial)
    FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Medianet Flow',
           countDistinct(device_serial)
    FROM network_observability.medianet_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'SNMP Metrics',
           countDistinct(toString(DeviceId))
    FROM livenx_snmpdb.device_metric_dist
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'SNMP Traps',
           countDistinctIf(device_key, device_key != '') AS device_count
    FROM (
        SELECT coalesce(
            nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['deviceSerial']), ''),
            nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.name']), ''),
            nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['source.ip']), '')
        ) AS device_key
        FROM default.otel_logs
        WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
          AND ServiceName = 'snmptrapreceiver'
    )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Syslog',
           countDistinctIf(device_key, device_key != '') AS device_count
    FROM (
        SELECT coalesce(
            nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['deviceSerial']), ''),
            nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.name']), ''),
            nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['source.ip']), '')
        ) AS device_key
        FROM default.otel_logs
        WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
          AND Body LIKE '%SYS-%'
    )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Configs',
           countDistinctIf(device_key, device_key != '') AS device_count
    FROM (
        SELECT coalesce(
            nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['deviceSerial']), ''),
            nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.name']), ''),
            nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['source.ip']), '')
        ) AS device_key
        FROM default.otel_logs
        WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
          AND ServiceName IN ('routerconfig', 'recommendrouterconfig')
    )
)
ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT highest_flow AS label, count() AS value
FROM (
    SELECT
        d.DeviceSerial,
        multiIf(
            avc.serial != '', 'AVC',
            med.serial != '', 'Medianet',
            bas.serial != '', 'Basic',
            'No Flow'
        ) AS highest_flow
    FROM (
        SELECT DeviceSerial
        FROM livenx_modeldb.device_dist
        WHERE IsDeleted = false AND DeviceSerial != ''
        GROUP BY DeviceSerial
    ) d
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT device_serial AS serial FROM network_observability.avc_flows_5m
        WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
        GROUP BY serial
    ) avc ON avc.serial = d.DeviceSerial
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT device_serial AS serial FROM network_observability.medianet_flows_5m
        WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
        GROUP BY serial
    ) med ON med.serial = d.DeviceSerial
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT device_serial AS serial FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m
        WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
        GROUP BY serial
    ) bas ON bas.serial = d.DeviceSerial
)
GROUP BY highest_flow
ORDER BY value DESC

WITH
base_devices AS (
    SELECT
        DeviceSerial AS serial,
        coalesce(
            nullIf(argMax(HostName,   Version), ''),
            nullIf(argMax(SystemName, Version), ''),
            DeviceSerial
        ) AS hostname,
        argMax(if(DeviceAddress != '', DeviceAddress, ClientAddress), Version) AS device_ip,
        argMax(VendorName,  Version) AS manufacturer,
        argMax(VendorModel, Version) AS model,
        lower(argMax(HostName,   Version)) AS hostname_lc,
        lower(argMax(SystemName, Version)) AS system_name_lc
    FROM livenx_modeldb.device_dist
    WHERE IsDeleted = false AND DeviceSerial != ''
    GROUP BY DeviceSerial
),
avc_flow AS (
    SELECT device_serial AS serial, 1 AS v
    FROM network_observability.avc_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    GROUP BY serial
),
basic_flow AS (
    SELECT device_serial AS serial, 1 AS v
    FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    GROUP BY serial
),
medianet_flow AS (
    SELECT device_serial AS serial, 1 AS v
    FROM network_observability.medianet_flows_5m
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    GROUP BY serial
),
snmp_metrics AS (
    SELECT toString(DeviceId) AS serial, 1 AS v
    FROM livenx_snmpdb.device_metric_dist
    WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
    GROUP BY serial
),
trap_seen AS (
    SELECT nullIf(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['deviceSerial']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['sinfo.DEVICE.deviceSerial']), '')
    ), '') AS serial, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND ServiceName = 'snmptrapreceiver'
    GROUP BY serial HAVING serial IS NOT NULL
),
trap_host AS (
    SELECT nullIf(lower(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.name']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['host.name']), '')
    )), '') AS host_name, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND ServiceName = 'snmptrapreceiver'
    GROUP BY host_name HAVING host_name IS NOT NULL
),
trap_ip AS (
    SELECT nullIf(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['source.ip']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.ip']), '')
    ), '') AS ip, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND ServiceName = 'snmptrapreceiver'
    GROUP BY ip HAVING ip IS NOT NULL
),
log_seen AS (
    SELECT nullIf(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['deviceSerial']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['sinfo.DEVICE.deviceSerial']), '')
    ), '') AS serial, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND Body LIKE '%SYS-%'
    GROUP BY serial HAVING serial IS NOT NULL
),
log_host AS (
    SELECT nullIf(lower(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.name']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['host.name']), '')
    )), '') AS host_name, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND Body LIKE '%SYS-%'
    GROUP BY host_name HAVING host_name IS NOT NULL
),
log_ip AS (
    SELECT nullIf(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['source.ip']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.ip']), '')
    ), '') AS ip, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND Body LIKE '%SYS-%'
    GROUP BY ip HAVING ip IS NOT NULL
),
cfg_seen AS (
    SELECT nullIf(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['deviceSerial']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['sinfo.DEVICE.deviceSerial']), '')
    ), '') AS serial, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND ServiceName IN ('routerconfig', 'recommendrouterconfig')
    GROUP BY serial HAVING serial IS NOT NULL
),
cfg_host AS (
    SELECT nullIf(lower(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.name']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(LogAttributes['host.name']), '')
    )), '') AS host_name, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND ServiceName IN ('routerconfig', 'recommendrouterconfig')
    GROUP BY host_name HAVING host_name IS NOT NULL
),
cfg_ip AS (
    SELECT nullIf(coalesce(
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['source.ip']), ''),
        nullIf(toString(ResourceAttributes['host.ip']), '')
    ), '') AS ip, 1 AS v
    FROM default.otel_logs
    WHERE TimestampTime >= now() - INTERVAL ${lookback_hours} HOUR
      AND ServiceName IN ('routerconfig', 'recommendrouterconfig')
    GROUP BY ip HAVING ip IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    d.hostname          AS "Device",
    d.device_ip         AS "Device IP",
    d.manufacturer      AS "Manufacturer",
    d.model             AS "Model",
    if(arrayStringConcat(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [
        if(coalesce(avc.v, 0) > 0, 'AVC', ''),
        if(coalesce(bas.v, 0) > 0, 'Basic', ''),
        if(coalesce(med.v, 0) > 0, 'Medianet', '')
    ]), '/') = '', 'None',
    arrayStringConcat(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [
        if(coalesce(avc.v, 0) > 0, 'AVC', ''),
        if(coalesce(bas.v, 0) > 0, 'Basic', ''),
        if(coalesce(med.v, 0) > 0, 'Medianet', '')
    ]), '/'))           AS "Receiving Flow Types",
    multiIf(
        coalesce(avc.v, 0) > 0, 'AVC',
        coalesce(med.v, 0) > 0, 'Medianet',
        coalesce(bas.v, 0) > 0, 'Basic',
        'None'
    )                   AS "Highest Flow Supported",
    if(coalesce(snmp.v, 0) > 0, 'Yes', 'No') AS "Are we collecting SNMP metrics",
    if(greatest(
        coalesce(ts.v,  0), coalesce(th1.v, 0),
        coalesce(th2.v, 0), coalesce(ti.v,  0)
    ) > 0, 'Yes', 'No') AS "Are we Receiving Traps",
    if(greatest(
        coalesce(ls.v,  0), coalesce(lh1.v, 0),
        coalesce(lh2.v, 0), coalesce(li.v,  0)
    ) > 0, 'Yes', 'No') AS "Are we Receiving Logs",
    if(greatest(
        coalesce(cs.v,  0), coalesce(ch1.v, 0),
        coalesce(ch2.v, 0), coalesce(ci.v,  0)
    ) > 0, 'Yes', 'No') AS "Are we Receiving Configs"
FROM base_devices d
LEFT JOIN avc_flow      avc  ON avc.serial    = d.serial
LEFT JOIN basic_flow    bas  ON bas.serial    = d.serial
LEFT JOIN medianet_flow med  ON med.serial    = d.serial
LEFT JOIN snmp_metrics  snmp ON snmp.serial   = d.serial
LEFT JOIN trap_seen     ts   ON ts.serial     = d.serial
LEFT JOIN trap_host     th1  ON th1.host_name = d.hostname_lc
LEFT JOIN trap_host     th2  ON th2.host_name = d.system_name_lc
LEFT JOIN trap_ip       ti   ON ti.ip         = d.device_ip
LEFT JOIN log_seen      ls   ON ls.serial     = d.serial
LEFT JOIN log_host      lh1  ON lh1.host_name = d.hostname_lc
LEFT JOIN log_host      lh2  ON lh2.host_name = d.system_name_lc
LEFT JOIN log_ip        li   ON li.ip         = d.device_ip
LEFT JOIN cfg_seen      cs   ON cs.serial     = d.serial
LEFT JOIN cfg_host      ch1  ON ch1.host_name = d.hostname_lc
LEFT JOIN cfg_host      ch2  ON ch2.host_name = d.system_name_lc
LEFT JOIN cfg_ip        ci   ON ci.ip         = d.device_ip
ORDER BY d.hostname

title: LiveNX Device Observabilityv2
